tracks.title: Full Curriculum
tracks.description: The traditional route — a progressive structure with eligibility for rank promotions up to Guro (Instructor) level. A curriculum I helped design and formalize, currently used by Lapunti Karilyon. Based on traditional Lapunti lessons but structured and supplemented for progressive learning and easier absorption.

tracks.title: Focused Sessions
tracks.description: Modular training designed for those who want to learn basic self-defense or particular aspects of the art. For those with limited time or who cannot commit to the full curriculum path.
